sourceBio: President & CEO @ycombinator —Founder @garryslist—Creator of GStack & GBrain—designer/engineer who helps founders—SF Dem accelerating the boom loop
title: Garry Tan · @garrytan

sentences.text: Saturday morning and it’s a good time to think a bit about how our functional systems are being torn down by a mind virus by two philosophers: Foucault and Derrida Foucault: His framework tells you that every institution claiming to know something is really just exercising power.
Medicine, engineering, law, science.
Apply that at civilizational scale and you get exactly what Dan Wang warns about: a society that lost the will to build.
Process knowledge — the tacit know-how that only exists in the hands of people who actually make things — dies when a culture decides that all knowledge claims are suspect.
America went from building the Interstate Highway System and the Apollo rockets to being unable to build a train from LA to SF.
That didn't happen because we forgot the engineering.
It happened because we built an entire intellectual class whose job is to interrogate every system rather than improve one.
Derrida: His move is that every commitment contains its own contradiction, so you can never land on firm meaning.
Run that as societal firmware and you get the bureaucratic paralysis we now live in.
Infrastructure projects stuck in 15 years of environmental review because every statement of purpose deconstructs under the next round of stakeholder input.
Institutions that can't say what they're for because every draft mission statement gets wordsmithed into mush by people trained to find the hidden hierarchy in any clear sentence.
Derrida is the OS behind a civilization that can write a 4,000 page environmental impact report but can't pour concrete.
The real damage is these ideas escaped the lab.
Every institution that adopted this operating system stopped trying to discover truth and started managing narrative.
DEI bureaucracies, academic hiring committees, media editorial standards.
All running on Foucault and Derrida whether they know it or not.
The antidote is building.
The physical bridge across a river holds or it doesn’t.
The code compiles or it doesn't.
Reality keeps score and it doesn't grade on a curve.
Foucault and Derrida gave a generation a sophisticated excuse to never build anything.
Their followers inherited the sophistication and the impotence.
It’s time to build again.

paragraphs.zh: 周六早晨，正适合想一想：我们的功能性系统是如何被两位哲学家——Foucault 和 Derrida——制造的一种 mind virus（心智病毒）一步步拆解的。Foucault：他的框架告诉你，任何声称自己“知道某些事情”的机构，本质上都只是在行使权力。Medicine、engineering、law、science 都一样。把这套思路应用到文明尺度上，你就会得到 Dan Wang 所警告的那种局面：一个失去了建设意志的社会。Process knowledge（过程性知识）——那种只存在于真正动手造东西的人手中的 tacit know-how（默会诀窍）——会在一种文化认定所有知识主张都值得怀疑时走向死亡。America 曾经能建设 Interstate Highway System、制造 Apollo rockets，如今却连一条从 LA 到 SF 的火车都建不出来。这不是因为我们忘了 engineering，而是因为我们培养出了整个 intellectual class（知识阶层），他们的工作是审问每一个系统，而不是改进任何一个系统。Derrida：他的关键动作在于，任何承诺都包含其自身的矛盾，因此你永远无法落到稳固的意义之上。把这当作社会的 firmware（固件）来运行，就会得到我们如今身处其中的 bureaucratic paralysis（官僚瘫痪）。Infrastructure projects 因为长达 15 年的 environmental review（环境审查）而被卡住，因为每一份 purpose statement（目的陈述）都会在下一轮 stakeholder input（利益相关方意见）中被 deconstruct（解构）掉。Institutions 连自己是为了什么而存在都说不清，因为每一版 mission statement（使命陈述）草案都会被那些受训于从任何清晰句子里寻找 hidden hierarchy（隐藏等级结构）的人修辞打磨成一团糨糊。Derrida 就是一种文明背后的 OS（操作系统）：它能写出 4,000 页的 environmental impact report（环境影响报告），却浇不出混凝土。真正的伤害在于，这些思想逃出了实验室。凡是采用了这套 operating system（操作系统）的机构，都不再试图发现真相，而开始管理 narrative（叙事）。DEI bureaucracies、academic hiring committees、media editorial standards——无论它们自己知不知道，全都运行在 Foucault 和 Derrida 之上。解药是 building（建设）。横跨河流的实体桥梁，要么撑得住，要么撑不住。代码要么能 compile（编译），要么不能。Reality 会记分，而且不会按曲线给分。Foucault 和 Derrida 给了一代人一个复杂而体面的借口，让他们永远不必建成任何东西；他们的追随者继承了这种复杂性，也继承了这种无力。现在，是时候重新建设了。

sentences.text: GBrain is free open source.
It’s MIT license.
You can find it and install it in your agent with one command.

paragraphs.zh: GBrain 是免费开源的，采用 MIT license。你只需一条命令，就能找到它并把它安装进你的 agent。

sentences.text: What is GBrain?
My open source project is a knowledge system, not RAG in a box.
It gives agents 8 layers that work together to improve memory in a way that makes your already smart OpenClaw or Hermes Agent feel clairvoyant about who you are.
Personal AI becomes possible.

paragraphs.zh: 什么是 GBrain？我的开源项目是一个 knowledge system（知识系统），不是“装在盒子里的 RAG”。它为 agents 提供 8 层能够协同工作的结构，以一种提升 memory（记忆）的方式，让你本来就很聪明的 OpenClaw 或 Hermes Agent 对“你是谁”这件事显得近乎 clairvoyant（先知般洞察）。Personal AI 因而成为可能。
